name: Amulet Score Guard
author: CupOfApplesauce
description: Safety net for a rare Amulet big-number edge case: a table-form value reaching math.floor in check_and_set_high_score can crash (and brick a save) when continuing a Cryptid ascension run. Skips the cosmetic high-score update instead of crashing. Transparent no-op without Amulet.
